title: Female Sexual & Reproductive Health
summaryPreview: Marketplace Female Sexual & Reproductive Health Developed by SelfDecode $59 per genome
bodyPreview:
Marketplace
Female Sexual & Reproductive Health
Developed by SelfDecode
$59 per genome
*Works Best With Whole Genome Sequencing
Get 100% of your DNA data with Whole Genome Sequencing.
Already have data from a DNA test? Upload your data for free.
This report analyzes 4M+ genetic variants to help you understand your genetic risks for sexual and reproductive conditions, while also providing personalized diet, lifestyle and supplement recommendations to improve your male hormones and health.
With this DNA report, you'll discover:
Personalized polygenic genetic risk scores for 19 key health topics related to sexual and reproductive health
Insights about how your genes affect reproductive conditions, like PCOS, endometriosis and more
A personalized and prioritized list of recommendations based on your unique genes
Polygenic risk score results for 9 of the 19 topics covered in the Female Health Report
This report includes hundreds of clickable scientific references and gives detailed information about your risk scores, what they mean and how to address them.
Personalized risk score for polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS)
Prioritized recommendations for PCOS, tailored to your genes
Sexual Dysfunction
Female Infertility
PCOS
Painful Periods
Irregular Periods
Heavy Periods
Menstrual Cycle Length
Uterine Fibroids
Endometriosis
Bioavailable Testosterone (F)
Estradiol
Testosterone (F)
DHEAS
Prolactin
